Source   Edit  

Imports

population, spec, ast, programs, data, aliasmethod, fertilizer, tableau, grammar, maths

Types

Evolver[T; V] = object
  platform: T
  rng*: Rand
  name*: string
  grammar: Grammar
  fitone: FitOne[T, V]
  fitmany: FitMany[T, V]
  dataset: seq[SymbolSet[T, V]]
  targets: Option[seq[V]]
  balance: AliasMethod[int]
  core: CoreSpec
  tableau: Tableau
  population: Population[T]
  operators: AliasMethod[Operator[T, V]]
  gentime: MovingStat[float32]
  shorties: MovingStat[float32]
  novel: LPTab[Hash, PackedSet[int]]
  cache: LPTab[Hash, seq[V]]
  cacheCounter: int
  indexes: PackedSet[int]
Source   Edit   
FitMany[T; V] = proc (q: T; iter: iterator (): (ptr SymbolSet[T, V], ptr V);
                      p: Program[T]): Option[V]
a fitness function that runs against a series of symbolsets Source   Edit   
FitOne[T; V] = proc (q: T; s: SymbolSet[T, V]; p: Program[T]): Option[V]
a fitness function that runs against a single symbolset Source   Edit   
Operator[T; V] = proc (evo: var Evolver[T, V]): seq[Program[T]] {.nimcall.}
Source   Edit   
OperatorWeight[T; V] = tuple[operator: Operator[T, V], weight: float64]
Source   Edit   
UnfitError = object of ValueError
Source   Edit  

Consts

defaultP = 0.05
Source   Edit   
greadHoeffding = 20
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc cacheSize[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]): int
the total number of cached scores in the evolver Source   Edit   
proc cacheSize[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]; p: Program[T]): int
the number of cached scores measured for the program Source   Edit   
proc cacheUsage(evo: Evolver): float
a metric on cache consumption for reporting Source   Edit   
proc clearStats(evo: var Evolver)
reset any statistics recorded by the Evolver Source   Edit   
proc confidentComparison(evo: var Evolver; a, b: Program; p = defaultP): int
compare two programs with high confidence and minimal sampling Source   Edit   
proc core(evo: var Evolver): CoreSpec
Source   Edit   
proc core=(evo: var Evolver; core: CoreSpec)
Source   Edit   
proc dataset[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]): lent seq[SymbolSet[T, V]]
Source   Edit   
proc dataset=[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; dataset: seq[(SymbolSet[T, V], V)])
assign a series of possible inputs, and their expected outputs Source   Edit   
proc dataset=[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; dataset: seq[SymbolSet[T, V]])
assign a series of possible inputs Source   Edit   
proc del(evo: var Evolver; p: Program)
remove a program from the evolver; currently used to drop cache entries Source   Edit   
proc fitmany[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]): FitMany[T, V]
the currently configured fitness function for multiple outputs Source   Edit   
proc fitmany=[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; fitter: FitMany[T, V])
assign a new fitness function to the evolver Source   Edit   
proc fitone[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]): FitOne[T, V]
the currently configured fitness function for a single symbol set Source   Edit   
proc fitone=[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; fitter: FitOne[T, V])
assign a new fitness function to the evolver Source   Edit   
proc fittest[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]): Option[Program[T]]
Source   Edit   
proc generationTime(evo: Evolver): MovingStat[float32]
fetch the generation time statistics Source   Edit   
proc generationTime(evo: var Evolver; ms: float)
add a generation time (in millis) for recordkeeping Source   Edit   
proc grammar[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]): Grammar
Source   Edit   
proc grammar=[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; grammar: Grammar)
Source   Edit   
proc initEvolver[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; platform: T; tableau: Tableau;
                       rng: Rand = randState())
perform initial setup of the Evolver, binding platform and tableau Source   Edit   
proc operators=[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V];
                      weighted: openArray[(Operator[T, V], float64)])
Source   Edit   
proc platform[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]): T
recover the platform of an evolver Source   Edit   
proc population[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]): Population[T]
Source   Edit   
proc population=[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; population: Population[T])
Source   Edit   
proc randomDataIndexes(evo: var Evolver): seq[int]
a randomly-ordered sequence of dataset indexes Source   Edit   
proc randomOperator[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]): Operator[T, V]
Source   Edit   
proc randomPop[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]): Population[T]
create a new (random) population using the given evolver's parameters Source   Edit   
proc randomSymbols[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]): SymbolSet[T, V]
select a random symbol set from the dataset Source   Edit   
proc resetCache(evo: var Evolver)
clear the cache of previously-evaluated symbol sets, per each program Source   Edit   
proc score[T, V](evo: Evolver[T, V]; ss: ptr SymbolSet[T, V]; p: Program[T]): Option[
    V] {....deprecated: "use index".}
Deprecated: use index
score the program against a single symbol set; if the program cache is enabled via its programCache constant, then we might simply fetch the score from there. otherwise, we'll run the evolver's fitone function against the platform and data record to evaluate the program. this scoring function also runs a stopwatch over fitone() and update's the programs runtime statistics. Source   Edit   
proc score[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; index: int; p: Program[T]): Option[V]
score the program against a single symbol set; we'll run the evolver's fitone function against the platform and data record to evaluate the program result. this scoring function also runs a stopwatch over fitone() and update's the program's runtime statistics. Source   Edit   
proc score[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; indices: ptr PackedSet[int];
                 p: Program[T]): Option[V]
score a program against a subset of symbol sets from the evolver Source   Edit   
proc score[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; p: Program[T]): Option[V]
score the program against all available symbol sets Source   Edit   
proc scoreFromCache[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; p: Program[T]): Option[V]
compute a new score for the program using prior evaluations Source   Edit   
proc scoreRandomly[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; p: Program[T]): Option[V]
evaluate a program against a random symbol set; a smoke test Source   Edit   
proc shortGenome(evo: Evolver): MovingStat[float32]
retrieve the statistics on mapping failures due to short genomes Source   Edit   
proc shortGenome(evo: var Evolver; tooShort: bool)
record a short (true) or sufficient (false) genome result due to mapping Source   Edit   
proc tableau(evo: Evolver): Tableau
Source   Edit   
proc targets=[T, V](evo: var Evolver[T, V]; targets: seq[V])
Source   Edit
